title: Dover Corporation 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary source for Dover's business segments, 2025 revenue, earnings, segment margins, acquisitions, and product-market descriptions.

title: Clean Energy & Fueling
note: Dover segment page describing DFS, OPW, fueling, clean energy, cryogenic gas, vehicle wash, payment, and monitoring offerings.

title: Imaging & Identification
note: Dover segment page describing Markem-Imaje, Systech, marking, coding, product traceability, authentication, and digital printing markets.

title: Dover Fueling Solutions
note: Product source for DFS fuel retail, EV charging, Bulloch POS, Anthem UX, tank gauging, monitoring, diagnostics, and site operations positioning.

title: Markem-Imaje
note: Product source for Markem-Imaje industrial coding, marking, CoLOS software, GS1 Digital Link positioning, printers, lasers, labels, and traceability offerings.

title: Dover Corporation (DOV) Market Capitalization
note: Point-in-time market capitalization reference used for Dover's marketCap input metric.

title: Dover Corporation (DOV) P/E Ratio
note: Point-in-time trailing P/E ratio reference used for Dover's peRatio input metric.

title: Open Charge Point Protocol
note: Technical source for OCPP 2.0.1 and 2.1 functionality, including charger management, security, smart charging, bidirectional charging, DER control, and payment-related protocol features.

title: CitrineOS
note: Open-source EV charging station management system source used as a DFS alternative and OCPP implementation enabler.

title: OpenEVSE Electric Vehicle Charging Solutions
note: Open EV charging hardware and software source used as a lower-scale DFS EV charging alternative.

title: OpenEVSE Firmware Repository
note: Public source repository for OpenEVSE firmware and developer reference.

title: GS1 Digital Link Standard: URI Syntax
note: Technical standard for representing GS1 identification keys in web addresses, used as an interoperable traceability and product identity enabler.

title: EPCIS Standard
note: Technical standard for creating and sharing supply-chain visibility event data across applications and enterprises.

title: Zint Barcode Generator
note: Open-source barcode generation project used as a Markem-Imaje software-layer alternative for code generation workflows.

title: zint/zint
note: Public source repository and licensing reference for Zint barcode generation library and tools.
